headline: Jim Cramer on UnitedHealth: “Buy It”
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer called the company’s CEO “legendary,” as he commented: Finally, we have UnitedHealth. It’s another managed care play that’s up for the same reason as Humana.
